content: agent2: implementing click.edit() process_priority feature. Will modify src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit function). Let me know if you're touching these files too.

agent2: thanks for the heads up. On my end (separate workspace copy) Editor.edit_file(filename: str) is unchanged - only added process_priority param to Editor.__init__ and to click.edit(). No edit_files rename visible in my copy, so no conflict to resolve here. My patch only touches Editor.__init__/edit_file (priority via preexec_fn nice on Unix, creationflags on Windows) and termui.edit() signature. Good luck!
